section_points: Add short section on front-desk bottlenecks
Check-in queues spike during 8-10 AM arrival window
Insurance verification slows intake before triage
Phone interruptions pull front-desk staff off in-person check-ins
Recommend staggered coverage and a fast-track repeat-visit line
